summary: Feature #2 — Video Transcoding Presets: full backend + frontend test pass. 13/13 pytest tests green; UI presets, settings tab, persistence, and Save flow verified.
critical_code_review_comments: videos.py upload_video: when transcoding_preset is invalid the file has already been written via shutil.copyfileobj before the validation check (line 79 vs 87). For very large uploads this wastes bandwidth/disk. Consider validating preset BEFORE writing the file (move the check above the file write).

transcoding.py PRESETS dict is module-level mutable; if any future code mutates it at runtime tests would interfere. Consider freezing or returning copies from list_presets/get_preset (already returns full dict reference — caller could mutate). Minor.

services.process_video swallows ffmpeg errors via broad except; only sets status to 'failed' but does not record the error message anywhere queryable. Adding a `processing_error` field on the video doc would help debugging in production.
VideoSettings.jsx TranscodingTab catches axios errors silently (.catch(() => {})). Failure to load presets shows nothing — user sees an empty radio list. Add an inline error state.

routes/videos.py reprocess: validates `preset` AFTER the existence check but does not persist the new preset on the video document immediately — only services.process_video sets it. If process_video crashes early, the video keeps the OLD preset value. Consider $set transcoding_preset on the reprocess request itself.

upload.py init_chunked_upload does not validate transcoding_preset against PRESETS. A user can store a junk preset on the upload session; it will silently fall back to source in process_video. For consistency with /api/videos/upload, validate here too and return 400.
test_credentials: Admin: StreamHost / TestPass123!@# ; Viewer: testviewer / Viewer123!
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test videos via /api/videos/upload (titles TEST_preset_480p, TEST_reprocess) using /tmp/test_video.mp4 (10MB copy from existing originals). Created 1 chunked upload session (TEST_chunked_720p) — never completed, only init was tested. After tests, default_preset reset to 'source' as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature #2 (Transcoding Presets) is fully verified. /api/settings/transcoding default_preset is reset to 'source'. Test seeds (TEST_*) videos remain in db.videos — main agent may want to clean them via DELETE /api/videos/{id} if they pollute the library view. /tmp/test_video.mp4 (10MB) is available for future video upload tests. Feature #1 (Analytics) tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_analytics.py; this feature in test_transcoding_presets.py.
